title: Tender Scoundrel
writer: Michel Audiard, Jean Becker, Daniel Boulanger
actors: Jean-Paul Belmondo, Nadja Tiller, Jean-Pierre Marielle
plot: Tony Maréchal is a professional seducer. Having conquered countless women, proclaims that there is none that can resist his charm. To prove this makes a difficult challenge: to seduce baroness Minna von Strasshofer.
